notFound.title: Member not found
notFound.description: The member number is not valid or does not exist in our system.

expired.title: Code expired
expired.description: This verification code has expired. Ask the member to generate a new one from their digital card.

legal.disclaimer: By using this verification service, you accept our data processing and privacy policies. Check our legal documents for more information.

footer.brand: Official verification of the {{siteName}} Members Club.
